organizations.description: Military alliance with Article 5 collective defense. ~70% of combined spending from Columbia.
Political-economic union. Trade policy and sanctions coordination. Commissioner chairs.
International security body. P5 veto power. Structurally paralyzed on major issues.
Coordination forum for non-Western powers. Alternative payment systems and development bank.
Oil production coordination. Each member independently sets production. Classic prisoners dilemma.
Western coordination on tech restrictions and sanctions. Non-binding joint statements.
Internal legislative body. 5 seats. Budget and treaty ratification require parliamentary approval.
Every country votes. No veto. No enforcement. Moral weight. Forces public position declarations.

dealer.title: President of Columbia
dealer.ticking_clock: Term-limited age 80. 10% per-round incapacitation risk. Legacy = reshaping world order.

volt.title: Vice President of Columbia
volt.ticking_clock: Succession race. Must balance loyalty to Dealer with own presidential ambitions. America First isolationist wing.

anchor.title: Secretary of State
anchor.ticking_clock: Succession race. Cuba is personal trophy. Hawkish diplomatic establishment.

shield.title: Secretary of Defense
shield.ticking_clock: Overstretched military. Persia war consuming resources. Pacific deterrence at risk. Warrior ethos philosophy.

shadow.title: Director of Central Intelligence
shadow.ticking_clock: Controls what Dealer sees. Information is power. Can shape decisions through selective briefings.

tribune.title: Speaker of the Opposition
tribune.ticking_clock: Mid-terms Round 2. If opposition wins Seat 5 Parliament flips 3-2.

challenger.title: Presidential Candidate
challenger.ticking_clock: Presidential election Round 5. Every foreign leader hedges between Dealer and Challenger.

fixer.title: Presidential Envoy for Peace
fixer.ticking_clock: Expansion role. Parallel diplomatic channel may contradict official policy.

pioneer.title: Presidential Envoy for Technology
pioneer.ticking_clock: Expansion role. Tech tycoon with unaccountable influence.

helmsman.title: Chairman of Cathay
helmsman.ticking_clock: No successor. Age 72. 5-10% incapacitation risk per round. Legacy requires Formosa resolution.

rampart.title: Marshal of Cathay
rampart.ticking_clock: Purge survivor. Co-signature required for military orders. Can slow-walk with 1-round delay. Anti-corruption commissar background.

abacus.title: Premier of Cathay
abacus.ticking_clock: Controls real economic data. Hidden local debt crisis ($9-13T LGFVs). Acting leader if Helmsman incapacitated.

circuit.title: Minister of Technology and Industry
circuit.ticking_clock: Global assets at risk. Rare earth weapon is depreciating. 2 personal coins represent assets abroad.

sage.title: Retired Senior Leader
sage.ticking_clock: Activates when stability < 5 or support < 40%. Party immune system. Can convene party conference.

lumiere.title: President of Gallia
lumiere.ticking_clock: Strategic autonomy champion. UNSC veto. Nuclear power. Ile-Longue speech expanding deterrent. 11-16% domestic approval.

forge.title: Chancellor of Teutonia
forge.ticking_clock: Massive Cathay trade dependency. Pressured to spend 5% GDP on defense. Hosts Columbia main European base. EUR 100B defense fund.

sentinel.title: President of Freeland
sentinel.ticking_clock: NATO frontline. 4.8% GDP defense spending. Hosts Columbia forward deployments. Cohabitation with opposition president.

ponte_role.title: Prime Minister of Ponte
ponte_role.ticking_clock: EU swing vote. 137.9% debt-to-GDP. 8 coins/round debt service. Russia-sympathetic coalition partners. Referendum defeat.

mariner.title: Prime Minister of Albion
mariner.ticking_clock: NATO but not EU. Five Eyes intelligence broker. UNSC veto. Offering troops for Ruthenia ceasefire monitoring.

pillar.title: Commissioner of The Union
pillar.ticking_clock: Cannot vote but sets EU agenda. Nightmare: member states bypassing EU for bilateral deals.

pathfinder.title: President of Sarmatia
pathfinder.ticking_clock: Age 73. 5-10% incapacitation risk increasing 2%/round. No succession plan. War must produce callable victory.

ironhand.title: Chief of General Staff
ironhand.ticking_clock: Nuclear co-authorization required. Can slow-walk orders. Coup potential if conditions align with Compass.

compass.title: Oligarch / Back-Channel
compass.ticking_clock: 3 personal coins frozen abroad. Direct financial incentive for peace. Back-channels to West.

ledger.title: Prime Minister of Sarmatia
ledger.ticking_clock: Expansion role. Keeps the machine running. Sees real economic data. Institutional loyalty.

beacon.title: President of Ruthenia
beacon.ticking_clock: 22.6% first-round vote share but controls executive under martial law. Corruption scandal damaged credibility.

bulwark.title: Commander-in-Chief
bulwark.ticking_clock: Would beat Beacon 64-36 in runoff. More popular than president. Wartime election candidate.

broker.title: Opposition Leader
broker.ticking_clock: EU connections and oligarchic resources. Peace deal candidate. Territory-for-security trade.

furnace.title: Supreme Leader of Persia
furnace.ticking_clock: Mojtaba Khamenei parallel. Installed by IRGC. May be hiding/injured. Override costs -5 support -1 stability each use.

anvil.title: Commander of Revolutionary Guard
anvil.ticking_clock: IRGC controls 1/3 of economy. 2 personal coins = IRGC institutional wealth. Sanctions relief = personal profit. Can veto military orders with 1-round delay.

dawn.title: Reformist Leader
dawn.ticking_clock: Represents 60% under 30. Deals with Dawn as signatory get +20% credibility. Activates when stability < 4 or support < 30%.

scales.title: Prime Minister of Bharata
scales.ticking_clock: 2026 BRICS+ host. Multi-alignment doctrine. Everyone needs something from Bharata. Refused to take position on Iran war.

citadel.title: Prime Minister of Levantia
citadel.ticking_clock: Multi-front war: Persia + Lebanon + Gaza. Operation Rising Lion. Densest air defense in world. Undeclared nuclear L1.

chip.title: President of Formosa
chip.ticking_clock: KMT legislature blocking defense budget. $40B defense plan cut 70%. Silicon shield eroding as fabs built abroad.

vizier.title: President of Phrygia
vizier.ticking_clock: 2026 NATO summit host. Controls Bosphorus and Dardanelles. NATO member + BRICS+ observer. S-400 buyer.

sakura.title: Prime Minister of Yamato
sakura.ticking_clock: First female PM. Record defense budget $57.8B. 2% GDP achieved early. Latent nuclear capability. Rapidus 2nm chip project.

wellspring.title: Crown Prince of Solaria
wellspring.ticking_clock: Under active Persia missile attack. Ras Tanura refinery damaged. $16.5B arms package from Columbia. Will go nuclear if Persia does.

pyro.title: Supreme Leader of Choson
pyro.ticking_clock: 15000+ troops in Ruthenia. 6000+ casualties. Blood-for-technology with Sarmatia. Crisis on demand capability.

vanguard.title: President of Hanguk
vanguard.ticking_clock: Post-martial-law recovery. Maximum flexibility doctrine. Security with Columbia economy with Cathay. Samsung/SK Hynix leverage.

havana.title: Leader of Caribe
havana.ticking_clock: Under Columbia energy blockade. Nationwide blackout March 2026. Can invite Sarmatia/Cathay military assets to trigger Monroe Doctrine crisis.

spire.title: Ruler of Mirage
spire.ticking_clock: 357 ballistic missiles + 1815 drones launched at UAE. Financial intermediary: +20% sanctions effectiveness when cooperating or +20% evasion when enabling.

result.note: Ruthenia election: Beacon loses. Bulwark becomes president.
Ruthenia election: Beacon loses. Bulwark becomes president.
